overview: Visual Lens is a feature-rich Google Lens-style visual recognition app powered by Venice AI. Capture or upload images (or video frames) to identify objects, plants, food, landmarks, text, and more across 9 specialized analysis modes. All your scans, collections, and settings are stored securely onchain.
features: 9 analysis modes: plant ID, food scanner, OCR, art & landmark, book/product lookup, language translation, receipt parser, medical reference, car & fashion
Camera capture, image upload, and video frame extraction
AI-powered web search results alongside every analysis
Scan history, saved collections, and side-by-side comparison
Public discovery feed with full filters and sorting
PDF export (single scan or bulk from history/collections)
AI tag suggestions when saving to collections
Comprehensive settings hub with onchain-persisted preferences
Quick-scan floating button and PWA homescreen shortcut
